revops_developer.name: REVOPS_DEVELOPER
revops_developer.comment: Read/write RAW + STAGING + MARTS (all envs); the role dbt jobs use to build models incl. PROD

revops_admin.name: REVOPS_ADMIN
revops_admin.comment: Full domain access; only role that sees unmasked ARR

revops_ingestion_fivetran.comment: All privileges on tables+views in RAW Salesforce (SALESFORCE_RAW_FIVETRAN) - Fivetran connector
